description_long: This is a modern, tactical bullpup-style rifle with a matte black finish, featuring a compact and streamlined design. The rifle has a prominent integrated stock and a pistol grip located forward of the magazine, characteristic of bullpup configurations. A detachable scope is positioned above the main body, suggesting modularity for different sighting systems. The barrel is long and slender, extending well beyond the main body, and appears to lack any visible muzzle device. The magazine is integrated into the rear section, and the overall construction suggests the use of high-strength polymers and metal alloys. The rifle's exterior is smooth with minimal texturing, and its design is optimized for urban tactical scenarios.
description: A sleek, black bullpup rifle with a detachable scope, integrated stock, and a long, slender barrel. The design is compact and modern, suitable for tactical urban use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, the integrated stock, pistol grip, and the detachable scope above the receiver.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the slim profile of the barrel and the alignment of the scope with the rifle body.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the main features of the first side, with clear visibility of the stock and scope.
description_view_3: Bottom-up view emphasizing the undercarriage, pistol grip, and the magazine area integrated into the rear stock.
